events.name: World MTB Orienteering Championships 2026 and CX80 World Cup
CX80 World Cup Round 2 in MTB Orienteering and European MTB Orienteering Championships 2026
European Junior and Youth MTB Orienteering Championships 2026
CX80 World Cup Round 1 in MTB Orienteering and U23 World MTB Orienteering Championships 2026
Australian MTBO Long Distance Championships
events.information:
These events also offer a full range of age classes and are also part of the 2027 World Masters Series.  Entries for those classes are via Australian Eventor - link in Bulletin 1.
https://eventor.orienteering.asn.au/Events/Show/23068
WRE entrants based in Australia are encouraged to enter and pay through AUS Eventor. WRE entrants from outside Australia should enter here in IOF Eventor and may pay when they arrive at Registration at the Australian Champs events.
